opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The stomach cramps are agonizing, I am constantly running to the toilet to pass blood and mucus, and I feel completely drained.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The diarrhoea has been going on for months but in the last couple of days there is blood and mucus, the cramps are unbearable, and today I feel feverish and my heart is racing.

symptom_narrative.onset: loose stools started creeping in about 3 months ago; it got much worse over the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: 3 months of diarrhoea, badly worse for the last 2 days
symptom_narrative.character: watery diarrhoea that now has visible bright red blood and slimy mucus in it, with gripping cramps low in the belly
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the cramps are agonizing and I feel completely wiped out
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the cramp builds up before I have to rush to the toilet and eases off a bit once I have been
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: passing a motion takes the edge off the cramp for a little while
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a constant painful urge to go even when there's little there, blood and mucus every time, I've lost about 6 kg without trying, and today I feel hot and shivery and my heart keeps pounding
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm basically stuck in bed and can't get far from the bathroom; even standing up wears me out

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about coping and about fainting on the way to the bathroom because of how weak and drained I feel

objective_data_offered.value: feels dizzy and lightheaded when standing up
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported sensation, not a measured lying/standing blood pressure

objective_data_offered.value: feels hot and shivery and thinks a temperature has come on today
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective — no home thermometer reading offered

objective_data_offered.value: looks pale and drained, lying in bed and speaking in short sentences
describes the toilet bowl as having bright red blood mixed with clear jelly-like mucus
